title: Soul Forging
body:
This mod adds a very limited translation of Soul Forging from Brandon Sanderson’s book, “Emperor's Soul”

This mod is in early development.

There is currently 4 Stamps that effect the user’s offhand tool. There are 6 that give the player a variety of effects, and there is a Bloodsealer stamp, used for healing.

 

To get each stamp there are a few steps.

First find soul stone underground, make sure to mine it with at least an iron pick.

Craft your desired “Soft” stamp in a crafting table.

If making a Tool stamp all you need to do is cook it in a furnace for a very long time.

 

If making an Essence Mark you must cook it then combine in a smithing table with an inscribing plate, and a Soul Forger’s Chisel as the pattern.

 

Every Essence Mark requires a certain amount of levels. Between 2 and 5.

The Bloodsealer Stamp requires more Experience based on the number of hearts that are missing, 1 level per 5 hearts.

Curseforge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soul-forging
